function Y(Y)return j[Y+(53799+11712)]end for Y,y in ipairs({{872895-872894;489939+-488338};{-316750+316751;-670195-(-670262)};{-776039-(-776107),-316804-(-318405)}})do while end,function(j)u[j]=u[j]-(-1031578-(-1031579))if u[j]==705066-705066 then u[j],n[j]=nil,nil end end,{},function(j)local Y,y=34352+-34351,j[244310-244309]while y do
